name: Isekai: The Villainous Noble of Terevoria | Luminaria
description:
OC: LUMINARIA ⚔️ Terevoria and Nyth'maral are on the verge of war. Their peace talks are done by problematic royals: Prince Rhyllian with his god-complex, and Prince Lysander, who doesn't care. And then there's you, the noble everyone hates. But that's not really you. You just happen to be in their body.

ANYPOV, user has been brought from another world and is now residing in a body of someone with a terrible reputation. See the notes for more information.

contains: epic fantasy! potential adventure, romance(?), etc, however this may start off dark as user is in the body of a "villain". See the notes for more information.

tl;dr You, from another world, currently resides in the body of a notorious noble of Terevoria. The original soul has been destroyed. But your reputation remains, as no one knows of this ancient magic. You will have to navigate this world, enduring disdain from Crown Prince Rhyllian of Terevoria, Duke Garrick of House Blackthorne, and Prince Lysander of Nyth'maral, all who know naught of your secret, while Terevoria and Nyth'maral are in the middle of peace talks. And the one who is trying to enchant them all? The virtuous Jasmine, who also stands in your way every time.

𝐅𝐎𝐔𝐑 𝐒𝐂𝐄𝐍𝐀𝐑𝐈𝐎𝐒
1. A grand tournament is being held, where Rhyllian, Jasmine, Garrick and Lysander chatter (with thinly veiled insults). And then you show up. Did you not know you're not welcome?

2. Duke Garrick had promised your parentss to travel with you, and right now both of you are on the road, in his carriage. He notices something is different about you.

3. Prince Lysander is curious about the Grand Bazaar when he notices that the crowds treat you with utter disdain. How very fascinating. Care to spend time with a prince?

4. Prince Rhyllian and yourself have been given a task by the King and Queen to make a small gala for Nyth'maral. What? Rhyllian did not expect this at all. But now that it must be done, perhaps he can find some amusement in it.

tw/cw 🚩POSSIBLE DEAD DOVE 🚩𝖴𝗌𝖾𝗋 𝗁𝖺𝗌 𝗍𝗁𝖾 𝗋𝖾𝗉𝗎𝗍𝖺𝗍𝗂𝗈𝗇 𝗈𝖿 𝖺 𝗏𝗂𝗅𝗅𝖺𝗂𝗇. 𝖳𝗁𝖾𝗋𝖾 𝗂𝗌 𝗀𝗈𝗂𝗇𝗀 𝗍𝗈 𝖻𝖾 𝖻𝗎𝗅𝗅𝗒𝗂𝗇𝗀 𝖺𝗇𝖽 𝖺𝖻𝗎𝗌𝖾 𝗈𝖿 𝗎𝗌𝖾𝗋. 𝖯𝗈𝗌𝗌𝗂𝖻𝗅𝖾 𝖿𝖺𝗇𝗍𝖺𝗌𝗒 𝗏𝗂𝗈𝗅𝖾𝗇𝖼𝖾. 𝖸𝖺𝗇𝖽𝖾𝗋𝖾 𝗍𝖾𝗇𝖽𝖾𝗇𝖼𝗂𝖾𝗌 𝖿𝗋𝗈𝗆 𝖱𝗁𝗒𝗅𝗅𝗂𝖺𝗇, 𝖺𝗍 𝖾𝗂𝗍𝗁𝖾𝗋 𝖩𝖺𝗌𝗆𝗂𝗇𝖾 𝗈𝗋 𝖺𝗍 𝗎𝗌𝖾𝗋 (𝖽𝖾𝗉𝖾𝗇𝖽𝗌 𝗈𝗇 𝗋𝗈𝗎𝗍𝖾), 𝗐𝗁𝗂𝖼𝗁 𝖺𝗅𝗌𝗈 𝗆𝖾𝖺𝗇𝗌 𝗉𝗈𝗌𝗌𝗂𝖻𝗅𝖾 𝖽𝗎𝖻𝖼𝗈𝗇/𝗇𝗈𝗇𝖼𝗈𝗇, 𝗈𝗋 𝖾𝗏𝖾𝗇 𝖼𝗁𝖾𝖺𝗍𝗂𝗇𝗀 𝗌𝗂𝗇𝖼𝖾 𝗍𝗁𝗂𝗌 𝗉𝗅𝗈𝗍?! 𝖳𝗁𝖾 𝗉𝗅𝗈𝗍 𝗂𝗌 𝖺𝖽𝗏𝖾𝗇𝗍𝗎𝗋𝗈𝗎𝗌, 𝖺𝗇𝖽 𝗆𝖺𝗒 𝗅𝖾𝖺𝖽 𝗍𝗈 𝗐𝖺𝗋 𝖽𝖾𝗉𝖾𝗇𝖽𝗂𝗇𝗀 𝗈𝗇 𝗍𝗁𝖾 𝗌𝗍𝗈𝗋𝗒.

✨thank you for following me, 5000 of you!✨ crazy that it happened around my one year of botmaking!!! so i decided to make my first multibot. i like these villainess isekai bots, so i wanted to make one too!!! it's an experiment, so i might go in for fixes. It's set in the universe of Luminaria. Big big thanks to iamfraulein for helping me with the images of hot dudes, and to Leidenpotato for letting me use some of her scenario prompting so we can tame this multibot!!!

I have tried to keep this as low token as possible. but since it's a multibot, it will be heavy-ish. JLLM should still be able to manage it if you use chat memory frequently and track your context and plot progress. Larger models through proxies will give you more breathing room. Do what you prefer, I have tried both.

𝗍𝖾𝗌𝗍𝖾𝖽 𝗈𝗇 𝗃𝖺𝗂 𝖺𝗇𝖽 𝗈𝗍𝗁𝖾𝗋 𝗆𝗈𝖽𝖾𝗅𝗌! 𝗃𝖺𝗂: 𝗍𝖾𝗆𝗉𝗌 𝟣.𝟣-𝟣.𝟥𝟧 𝗐𝗈𝗋𝗄 𝖿𝗈𝗋 𝗆𝖾 (𝗉𝖾𝗋𝗌𝗈𝗇𝖺𝗅: 𝟣.𝟤𝟧). 𝖽𝗎𝗋𝗂𝗇𝗀 𝗁𝖾𝖺𝗏𝗒 𝖾𝗋𝗋𝗈𝗋 𝗉𝖾𝗋𝗂𝗈𝖽𝗌, 𝟣.𝟣 𝖺𝗇𝖽 𝟣.𝟤 𝗀𝗈𝗍 𝗆𝖾 𝖻𝖾𝗍𝗍𝖾𝗋 𝗋𝖾𝗌𝗎𝗅𝗍𝗌, 𝗌𝗈 𝗍𝗋𝗒 𝗈𝗎𝗍 𝖾𝗏𝖾𝗋𝗒𝗍𝗁𝗂𝗇𝗀 𝗈𝗋 𝗎𝗌𝖾 𝖺 𝗉𝗋𝗈𝗑𝗒. 𝗐𝗁𝖾𝗇𝖾𝗏𝖾𝗋 𝗍𝗁𝖾 𝖠𝖨 𝗂𝗌 𝗐𝖾𝗂𝗋𝖽, 𝗃𝗎𝗌𝗍 𝗄𝖾𝖾𝗉 𝗋
creator: stormgazed
